title: carex inops subsp. heliophila
intro: Carex inops subsp. heliophila, also known as the 'sun-loving sedge', is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Carex inops subsp. heliophila include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves and roots in water or oil to create teas, tinctures, and salves that can be used topically or internally.
